violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (cooked chicken) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Chicken was disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to call for service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets on prep unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
A leak was observed at the basins of the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
A leak was observed at the faucet of the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Allergen statement is lacking on menu boards and/or point of order. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Cheese was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit and placed above the fill line in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was relocated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Soup was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Soup disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, chicken was placed hot in the prep unit in plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was placed on sheet pans in reach-in refrigerator to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of multiple food items. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Knives were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Knives were taken to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. Inspector provided test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
A leak was observed at the faucet of the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the interior sides of ice machine have an accumulation of residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
Faucet at 3 bay sink observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
